positive: A stylized illustration of a lone celestial creature, perhaps a phoenix or a griffin, rendered in a dynamic, symmetrical, and clean silhouette against a gradient cosmic background of deep indigo and vibrant gold nebula dust. The creature is depicted in mid-flight, soaring through intricate, glowing stellar constellations that form the wings and tail. Minimalist line work with heavy saturation and high contrast. The style should be a blend of art deco symmetry and ethereal cosmic watercolor. Central composition, perfect for repeat or single print placement. Highly detailed, vector art aesthetic.
